data.name: Account Creation Line 1
data.value: If you do not have an account with Score Tracker, one will be created when you select one of the login providers.

data.name: Account Creation Line 2
data.value: The only information stored about your account from the login provider you select is the external ID (typically a random number or combination of letters), and the username. You can change the username at any time after account creation.

data.name: Account Creation Line 3
data.value: No passwords are stored in Score Tracker, we don't want them, you don't want us to have them, everyone is happier this way.

data.name: Account Creation?
data.comment: Button that pops up explination of account creation process

data.name: Chart List Share Description
data.value: Use this link to share your chart list to other players.

data.name: Chart Type
data.comment: Chart Types = single, double, co op

data.name: Make Not Public Disclaimer
data.value: Making your account private will make your scores and progress no longer be externally visible, even for anyone already following you. You will be removed from the World community.

data.name: Make Public Disclaimer 1
data.value: Making your account public will make your scores and progress externally visible. You will be added to the World community as well.

data.name: Make Public Disclaimer 2
data.value: If your account was previously public and you made it private, making it public again will make anyone following you able to see your progress again.

data.name: Phoenix Import Confirming
data.value: Continuing will begin to save the uploaded scores over your existing records. You will not be able to undo this. You will be able to stop the saving process, but it will not roll back uploads.

data.name: Phoenix Import Info 1
data.value: Use the Copy Script button below

data.name: Phoenix Import Info 2
data.value: Use that script in the dev tools while logged in on https://phoenix.piugame.com to download a CSV of your scores. (Make sure you aren't on phoenix.piugame.com)

data.name: Phoenix Import Info 3
data.value: You can then upload that CSV here for yoru scores to show up.

data.name: Phoenix Import Info 4
data.value: Note: This tool is fairly hacky and may require some debugging on your side to make work. Make sure to disable ad blockers.

data.name: Phoenix Import Saving
data.value: If you leave this page or cancel, the upload will stop but you will not lose any scores that have already been recorded from your upload.

data.name: Phoenix Import Saving Failures
data.value: You had a few charts that were not able to be downloaded. You can download a CSV of the failures to make adjustments and try again.

data.name: Phoenix Import Saving Progress
data.comment: I.E 4/192 Uploaded. 3:29 Remaining. 2 Failed to record

data.name: Phoenix Import Saving Success
data.value: All charts you uploaded were successfully updated!

data.name: Phoenix Import Uploading
data.value: Spreadsheet is uploading and being processed...

data.name: Public
data.comment: (on/off, if account is set to public)

data.name: Recorded On
data.comment: I.E Recorded on 12/6/2023 (I don't support date localization yet but will eventually)

data.name: Score Formula Shoutout
data.value: Shout out to MR_WEQ for reverse engineering this score formula!

data.name: Score Loss Note
data.value: Note: Score loss may be off by 1-4 points due to rounding

data.name: Score Range Shoutout
data.value: Shout out to daryen for collecting data and finalizing the score ranges for letter grades!

data.name: Song Type
data.comment: Song Types = Arcade, Full Song, etc.

data.name: Unpassed ToDos
data.value: You have {0} level {1} charts marked To Do that you haven't passed.
data.comment: I.E You have 19 level 24 charts marked To Do you haven't passed

data.name: Use Password 1
data.value: This will have PIUScores log into your account and import scores for you.

data.name: Use Password 2
data.value: By default I don't keep your username or password — you type them in each time. Or use the remember-password option below to save it, encrypted and only on this device.

data.name: Use Password 3
data.value: To minimize calls to https://phoenix.piugame.com I will only import new or improved scores. Every user only gets one full import using Username/Password. Use the dev-tools importer if you wish to re-import older scores.

data.name: Use Password 4
data.value: Once started, you can leave this page — the import finishes in the background.

data.name: Qualifier Submit Phrase 1
data.value: You do not need to be logged in to use this tool. Type a username to begin submitting.

data.name: Qualifier Submit Phrase 2
data.value: This is your first submission! Please make sure your Username is identifiable either through discord or Start.GG.

data.name: Level/Players
data.comment: Combined level/player-count input on the new-chart admin form.

data.name: Video info is not formatted correctly
data.value: Video info is not formatted correctly

data.name: Updated X Y
data.comment: {0} = song name, {1} = difficulty string (e.g. "S17"). Snackbar after a chart save on /ChartUpdate.

data.name: Huge thank you for KyleTT for compiling this information from FEFEMZ's recordings.
data.value: Huge thank you for KyleTT for compiling this information from FEFEMZ's recordings.
data.comment: Double space between "FEFEMZ's" and "recordings" preserved verbatim from source.

data.name: Note that this information is not final until referenced against actual released mix.
data.value: Note that this information is not final until referenced against actual released mix.

data.name: Disclaimer: This list is being refined, some charts are missing step artists and some may have incorrect artists.
data.value: Disclaimer: This list is being refined, some charts are missing step artists and some may have incorrect artists.

data.name: Disclaimer: This data was data-mined in NX2 and Prime, it is unconfirmed how accurate it is today.
data.value: Disclaimer: This data was data-mined in NX2 and Prime, it is unconfirmed how accurate it is today.

data.name: Note Count from Full Life to Death/Threshold based on Combo between Breaks
data.value: Note Count from Full Life to Death/Threshold based on Combo between Breaks

data.name: Notes to Full Life From Start of Song (50%)
data.value: Notes to Full Life From Start of Song (50%)

data.name: Starting life is 500, visible Life (Rainbow life bar) is 1000.
data.value: Starting life is 500, visible Life (Rainbow life bar) is 1000.
data.comment: Double space between "visible" and "Life" preserved verbatim from source.

data.name: Lifebar overflows exponentially by level, up to about a 2350 overflow at level 28.
data.value: Lifebar overflows exponentially by level, up to about a 2350 overflow at level 28.

data.name: By default, bads lose 50 health, misses lose 250 health (at ~100% health).
data.value: By default, bads lose 50 health, misses lose 250 health (at ~100% health).

data.name: Misses lose LESS health the further beneath 1000 health you are at (at 0 life you would lose 20 health for a miss)
data.value: Misses lose LESS health the further beneath 1000 health you are at (at 0 life you would lose 20 health for a miss)

data.name: By default at high combo, perfects gain 9.6 life, greats gain 8 life, goods gain 0 life.
data.value: By default at high combo, perfects gain 9.6 life, greats gain 8 life, goods gain 0 life.

data.name: This is modified by a multiplier that is almost entirely reset on a miss, and decreased drastically on a bad.
data.value: This is modified by a multiplier that is almost entirely reset on a miss, and decreased drastically on a bad.

data.name: Each perfect or great you get increases the multiplier by a minor amount.
data.value: Each perfect or great you get increases the multiplier by a minor amount.

data.name: Effectively, this means that your life gain is heavily affected by combo, reaching maximum gain at ~40-50 combo.
data.value: Effectively, this means that your life gain is heavily affected by combo, reaching maximum gain at ~40-50 combo.

data.name: To recover from Bads you require 17-21 combo per Bad. Bads typically let you live for 3x as long as misses.
data.value: To recover from Bads you require 17-21 combo per Bad. Bads typically let you live for 3x as long as misses.

data.name: To remain alive you need to maintain 17-21 combo per Miss.
data.value: To remain alive you need to maintain 17-21 combo per Miss.

data.name: To remain at 50% visible life, you need 37-46 combo per Miss.
data.value: To remain at 50% visible life, you need 37-46 combo per Miss.

data.name: To remain at Rainbow Life, you 46-55 combo per Miss.
data.value: To remain at Rainbow Life, you 46-55 combo per Miss.
data.comment: Likely missing "need" between "you" and "46-55" in source; preserved verbatim.

data.name: Bads at low health let you live for roughly 3x as long as misses, this gap increases the higher the life threshold you want to keep, up to misses punishing 6x as much when maintaining 100% visual life.
data.value: Bads at low health let you live for roughly 3x as long as misses, this gap increases the higher the life threshold you want to keep, up to misses punishing 6x as much when maintaining 100% visual life.

data.name: TLDR: Misses matter less at low life, but are always significantly more punishing than Bads.
data.value: TLDR: Misses matter less at low life, but are always significantly more punishing than Bads.

data.name: Misses or back-to-back Bads early in a run put you in a terribly position for maintaining life, as they reset your life gain multiplier and require you to combo ~40-50 to regain it. Start runs strong for increased success rates.
data.value: Misses or back-to-back Bads early in a run put you in a terribly position for maintaining life, as they reset your life gain multiplier and require you to combo ~40-50 to regain it. Start runs strong for increased success rates.

data.name: When at 12% or lower visual life, a miss gives less life loss than a bad, but inhibits your recovery severely. This only really matters for notes at the end of a song or before guaranteed 100+ combo sections.
data.value: When at 12% or lower visual life, a miss gives less life loss than a bad, but inhibits your recovery severely. This only really matters for notes at the end of a song or before guaranteed 100+ combo sections.

data.name: Try to maintain 17-21 combo per bad.
data.value: Try to maintain 17-21 combo per bad.

data.name: Try to maintain 40-50 combo per miss.
data.value: Try to maintain 40-50 combo per miss.

data.name: Lifebars are weird.
data.comment: Quote attributed to Zelllooo on the Life Calculator page.

data.name: Team Infinitesimal, data-mine from NX2 + Prime
data.value: Team Infinitesimal, data-mine from NX2 + Prime

data.name: Some players already maintain scores via Spreadsheets.
data.value: Some players already maintain scores via Spreadsheets.

data.name: In some of those cases, it may be faster to upload a Spreadsheet instead of manually inputting thousands of grades.
data.value: In some of those cases, it may be faster to upload a Spreadsheet instead of manually inputting thousands of grades.

data.name: After the upload, if there are some rows/charts/attempts that did not upload correctly, you will be given the option to download a list of the failed rows and the reason they failed.
data.value: After the upload, if there are some rows/charts/attempts that did not upload correctly, you will be given the option to download a list of the failed rows and the reason they failed.

data.name: Spreadsheet is uploading and being processed...
data.value: Spreadsheet is uploading and being processed...

data.name: XXLetterGrade
data.comment: Column header on the XX-score upload preview grid; matches the legacy property name.

data.name: IsBroken
data.comment: Column header on the XX-score upload preview grid; matches the legacy property name.

data.name: If you leave this page or cancel, the upload will stop but you will not lose any scores that have already been recorded from your upload.
data.value: If you leave this page or cancel, the upload will stop but you will not lose any scores that have already been recorded from your upload.

data.name: X/Y Uploaded. Z Remaining. W Failed to record
data.comment: Save progress status. {0}=saved count, {1}=total, {2}=time remaining (m:ss), {3}=failed count

data.name: You had a few charts that were not able to be downloaded. You can download a CSV of the failures to make adjustments and try again.
data.value: You had a few charts that were not able to be downloaded. You can download a CSV of the failures to make adjustments and try again.

data.name: All charts you uploaded were successfully updated!
data.value: All charts you uploaded were successfully updated!

data.name: You somehow ended up in a state between realities. Refresh the page to try again.
data.value: You somehow ended up in a state between realities. Refresh the page to try again.

data.name: Some adjustments to account for typos or difference in naming conventions have been accounted for. Song Names are Case Insensitive. (Note that some of these look the same because they are whitespace adjustments)
data.value: Some adjustments to account for typos or difference in naming conventions have been accounted for. Song Names are Case Insensitive. (Note that some of these look the same because they are whitespace adjustments)

data.name: File cannot be larger than 10 MB
data.value: File cannot be larger than 10 MB

data.name: There was an unknown error while parsing the file
data.value: There was an unknown error while parsing the file

data.name: Wouldn't You Like To Know
data.comment: Easter-egg tooltip shown for the user "CLEARALL18SORQUIT"

data.name: Site constructed and maintained by DrMurloc
data.value: Site constructed and maintained by DrMurloc

data.name: Original Concept (excel score tracking) Constructed by KyleTT
data.value: Original Concept (excel score tracking) Constructed by KyleTT

data.name: LetterDifficulties
data.comment: Page title on /Experiments/LetterDifficulties; the source has no space between "Letter" and "Difficulties".

data.name: Private User - X
data.comment: {0} = comparison-score number. Listed for users who have set their profile private.

data.name: ChartScoring
data.comment: Page title on /Experiments/ChartScoring; the source has no space between "Chart" and "Scoring".

data.name: All players with scores within the target folder are assigned weights based on how close their competitive level is to X.
data.value: All players with scores within the target folder are assigned weights based on how close their competitive level is to {0}.

data.name: Highlighted players have a recorded score on the chart in question.
data.value: Highlighted players have a recorded score on the chart in question.

data.name: Anonymous
data.comment: Display name shown for users who have set their profile private.

data.name: Competitively
data.comment: Word used in player-weight rows on /Experiments/ChartScoring (e.g. "(Competitively 12.34)").

data.name: The target folder and the three surrounding are provided weighted average scores utilizing the player weights above.
data.value: The target folder and the three surrounding are provided weighted average scores utilizing the player weights above.

data.name: These averages are shifted away from the level in question by .5 of a standard deviation within their respective folder to make sure level changes are better represented by the bulk of a surrounding folder.
data.value: These averages are shifted away from the level in question by .5 of a standard deviation within their respective folder to make sure level changes are better represented by the bulk of a surrounding folder.

data.name: The chart in question has its weighted average score projected onto the score distributions
data.value: The chart in question has its weighted average score projected onto the score distributions

data.name: There was not enough data for the targeted player level to evaluate a final difficulty.
data.value: There was not enough data for the targeted player level to evaluate a final difficulty.

data.name: The weighted average for this chart is better than the average for a X.
data.value: The weighted average for this chart is better than the average for a {0}.

data.name: In this case, the chart is determined to be below by X utilizing standard deviations in the Y folder.
data.value: In this case, the chart is determined to be below by {0} utilizing standard deviations in the {1} folder.

data.name: The weighted average for this chart is worst than the average for a X.
data.value: The weighted average for this chart is worst than the average for a {0}.
data.comment: Source spelling preserved verbatim ("worst" rather than "worse"). {0} = low-level integer.

data.name: In this case, the chart is determined to be above by X utilizing standard deviations in the Y folder.
data.value: In this case, the chart is determined to be above by {0} utilizing standard deviations in the {1} folder.

data.name: Determined to be X between Y and Z

At this point, it's identified that this chart has no players with a weight of .5 or higher (within 1 level). The chart is marked as not having a scoring level as any estimation would be based on missing data.
data.value: At this point, it's identified that this chart has no players with a weight of .5 or higher (within 1 level). The chart is marked as not having a scoring level as any estimation would be based on missing data.

data.name: The listed scoring difficulty is calculated for players competitively playing in the officially listed folder for a chart.
data.value: The listed scoring difficulty is calculated for players competitively playing in the officially listed folder for a chart.

data.name: The outcome of this algorithm has drastically different results for players at different levels though
data.value: The outcome of this algorithm has drastically different results for players at different levels though

data.name: This is intended. There are charts that are relatively easier to score to others in the folder for players just pushing into the folder, but are harder for higher level players to perfect.
data.value: This is intended. There are charts that are relatively easier to score to others in the folder for players just pushing into the folder, but are harder for higher level players to perfect.

data.name: Scoring Level by Player Competitive Level
data.value: Scoring Level by Player Competitive Level

data.name: For CoOps, scoring level is simply the lowest level player who's been able to pass the chart.
data.value: For CoOps, scoring level is simply the lowest level player who's been able to pass the chart.

data.name: This isn't perfect, but until I have more data other algorithms haven't been successful at projecting CoOps onto difficulty levels
data.value: This isn't perfect, but until I have more data other algorithms haven't been successful at projecting CoOps onto difficulty levels

data.name: No one has passed this CoOp yet so no level is assigned.
data.value: No one has passed this CoOp yet so no level is assigned.

data.name: This gives this chart a scoring level of: X
data.value: This gives this chart a scoring level of: {0}
data.comment: {0} = lowest passing player's competitive level (2 decimals).

data.name: As
data.comment: Plural of letter grade A — column header counting A grades.

data.name: Score Rankings (the colored scores) are based on comparisons to similarly skilled players.
data.value: Score Rankings (the colored scores) are based on comparisons to similarly skilled players.

data.name: The higher percent of players in your range that you perform better than, the better the color:
data.value: The higher percent of players in your range that you perform better than, the better the color:

data.name: Similarly skilled players to you for Singles:
data.value: Similarly skilled players to you for Singles:

data.name: Similarly skilled players to you for Doubles (CoOp charts use doubles competitive level):
data.value: Similarly skilled players to you for Doubles (CoOp charts use doubles competitive level):

data.name: Always
data.comment: Fallback for tournament StartDate when not set.

data.name: Never
data.comment: Fallback for tournament EndDate when not set.

data.name: Start Date: X
data.comment: {0} = formatted date string or the localized "Always" fallback.

data.name: End Date: X
data.comment: {0} = formatted date string or the localized "Never" fallback.

data.name: Players have X to play charts. You are allowed to finish the song you are on when your time runs out. Your total score is total combined score of all charts you play.
data.value: Players have {0} to play charts. You are allowed to finish the song you are on when your time runs out. Your total score is total combined score of all charts you play.

data.name: Broken scores get a multiplier of X
data.value: Broken scores get a multiplier of {0}

data.name: Songs will have score adjusted based on song length (treating 2 minutes as baseline)
data.value: Songs will have score adjusted based on song length (treating 2 minutes as baseline)

data.name: are
data.comment: Used in "Repeated charts {are/are not} allowed." sentence on the rules dialog.

data.name: are not
data.comment: Used in "Repeated charts {are/are not} allowed." sentence on the rules dialog.

data.name: Repeated charts X allowed.
data.comment: {0} = "are" or "are not" (also localized as separate keys).

data.name: Players (Paste UserId from Account Page if not Public)
data.value: Players (Paste UserId from Account Page if not Public)

data.name: This user does not exist. Double check the User Id
data.value: This user does not exist. Double check the User Id

data.name: X Charts
data.comment: {0} = chart count integer. Button label on /Tournament/Stamina/{id}.

data.name: Adjust Scores to Song Duration (uses 2 minutes as average chart duration)
data.value: Adjust Scores to Song Duration (uses 2 minutes as average chart duration)

data.name: Continous Modifier Scale (modifier increments between letter grades)
data.value: Continous Modifier Scale (modifier increments between letter grades)
data.comment: Source spelling preserved verbatim ("Continous" rather than "Continuous").

data.name: Perfect Score Modifier (Acts as a letter grade beyond SSS+)
data.value: Perfect Score Modifier (Acts as a letter grade beyond SSS+)

data.name: Player To Test (Must Be Set To Public)
data.value: Player To Test (Must Be Set To Public)

data.name: Road to BITE (Monthly Leaderboard July 8th - August 4th)
data.value: Road to BITE (Monthly Leaderboard July 8th - August 4th)
data.comment: Date-window heading used pre-BITE; specific to a fixed annual event window.

data.name: Co-Op
data.comment: Used as a select-item label on /WeeklyCharts. Distinct from the existing "CoOp" key (no hyphen) used elsewhere — both spellings appear in source verbatim.

data.name: What Should I Play
data.comment: Page title (no question mark in source).

data.name: What Should I Play?
data.comment: h3 header on the same page (with question mark in source).

data.name: Top 50 X
data.comment: {0} = chart type (e.g. "Singles" / "Doubles"). Tooltip on the crown icon for top-50 charts.

data.name: I Just Want to Hide The Chart
data.value: I Just Want to Hide The Chart

data.name: The Category Isn't Interesting to Me'
data.value: The Category Isn't Interesting to Me'
data.comment: Source has a stray trailing apostrophe — preserved verbatim.

data.name: Locking will set this user's username to their GameTag.
data.value: Locking will set this user's username to their GameTag.

data.name: This user has no GameTag. Choose a username to assign before locking.
data.value: This user has no GameTag. Choose a username to assign before locking.

data.name: Your account is content-locked. Message an admin if you have questions.
data.value: Your account is content-locked. Message an admin if you have questions.

data.name: This will delete all of your scores and reset your player stats and title progress
data.value: This will delete all of your scores and reset your player stats and title progress

data.name: You can sign in to your account with any connected method
data.value: You can sign in to your account with any connected method

data.name: You will no longer be able to sign in with this method
data.value: You will no longer be able to sign in with this method

data.name: This is your only sign-in method and cannot be disconnected
data.value: This is your only sign-in method and cannot be disconnected

data.name: This sign-in method is already connected to your account
data.value: This sign-in method is already connected to your account

data.name: This sign-in method is connected to a different account
data.value: This sign-in method is connected to a different account

data.name: Your username and password are sent directly to piugame.com and are never stored
data.value: Your username and password are sent directly to piugame.com and are never stored

data.name: Could not reach PIUGAME, try again later
data.value: Could not reach PIUGAME, try again later

data.name: PIUGAME logins depend on piugame.com being reachable, connect a backup sign-in method
data.value: PIUGAME logins depend on piugame.com being reachable, connect a backup sign-in method

data.name: Choose the account to merge with
data.value: Choose the account to merge with

data.name: Sign in with one of that account's methods to prove it's yours
data.value: Sign in with one of that account's methods to prove it's yours

data.name: That PIUGAME account is not connected to the selected account
data.value: That PIUGAME account is not connected to the selected account

data.name: All sign-in methods will work on the account you keep, the other account's data is deleted after 30 days
data.value: All sign-in methods will work on the account you keep, the other account's data is deleted after 30 days

data.name: Type the name of the account being deleted to confirm
data.value: Type the name of the account being deleted to confirm

data.name: You kept the other account, log in again to continue
data.value: You kept the other account, log in again to continue

data.name: Merged account data is deleted on
data.value: Merged account data is deleted on {0}

data.name: This sign-in method belongs to another account, you can merge the two accounts
data.value: This sign-in method belongs to another account, you can merge the two accounts

data.name: An account with game tag {0} already exists, is that you?
data.value: An account with game tag {0} already exists, is that you?

data.name: Phoenix 2 titles have not been revealed yet. Check back after launch!
data.value: Phoenix 2 titles have not been revealed yet. Check back after launch!

data.name: Phoenix 2 recommendations are coming soon. Check back after launch!
data.value: Phoenix 2 recommendations are coming soon. Check back after launch!

data.name: Coming soon — score import for Phoenix 2 will open after hardware verification.
data.value: Coming soon — score import for Phoenix 2 will open after hardware verification.

data.name: Phoenix 2 official leaderboards are coming soon.
data.value: Phoenix 2 official leaderboards are coming soon.

data.name: Your account is not associated with a game profile yet. Play a game on your account first, then try again.
data.value: Your account is not associated with a game profile yet. Play a game on your account first, then try again.

data.name: Upload a JSON file to create Phoenix 2 songs and charts in bulk.
data.value: Upload a JSON file to create Phoenix 2 songs and charts in bulk.

data.name: File is too large — 5 MB max.
data.value: File is too large — 5 MB max.

data.name: Already exists in the Phoenix 2 catalog — will be skipped.
data.value: Already exists in the Phoenix 2 catalog — will be skipped.

data.name: Exists in the Phoenix catalog — carried-over name collision, verify this is intentional.
data.value: Exists in the Phoenix catalog — carried-over name collision, verify this is intentional.

data.name: Image could not be copied to the CDN — source URL stored, rehost manually.
data.value: Image could not be copied to the CDN — source URL stored, rehost manually.

data.name: Score history begins with journaling (June 2026) — older plays aren't shown.
data.value: Score history begins with journaling (June 2026) — older plays aren't shown.

data.name: One of your first passes in this folder
data.value: One of your first passes in this folder

data.name: Rankings use the official Phoenix 2 PUMBILITY formula.
data.value: Rankings use the official Phoenix 2 PUMBILITY formula.

data.name: This recap hasn't been computed yet — check back soon.
data.value: This recap hasn't been computed yet — check back soon.

data.name: You walked in a {0}. You're walking out a {1}.
data.value: You walked in a {0}. You're walking out a {1}.

data.name: Some step artists are mislabeled in the wild — we report what the community knows.
data.value: Some step artists are mislabeled in the wild — we report what the community knows.

data.name: {0} of every BanYa & YAHPP chart passed
data.value: {0} of every BanYa & YAHPP chart passed

data.name: More than 75% of S24+ passed at AA+ or lower.
data.value: More than 75% of S24+ passed at AA+ or lower.

data.name: Seriously, Leave Some Titles for the Rest of Us
data.value: Seriously, Leave Some Titles for the Rest of Us

data.name: You Know Pump It Up Doesn't Do Lamps, Right?
data.value: You Know Pump It Up Doesn't Do Lamps, Right?

data.name: I Hope You Held Hands on Canon D
data.value: I Hope You Held Hands on Canon D

data.name: Now You Can Play the Game
data.value: Now You Can Play the Game

data.name: Three and a half years of Pump, one recap. Go see yours — and screenshot the good parts.
data.value: Three and a half years of Pump, one recap. Go see yours — and screenshot the good parts.

data.name: Your Phoenix story starts here — {0} charts already on the books.
data.value: Your Phoenix story starts here — {0} charts already on the books.

data.name: If your scores made the trip: {0} of your {1} passes map onto Phoenix 2 charts.
data.value: If your scores made the trip: {0} of your {1} passes map onto Phoenix 2 charts.

data.name: Tier lists for XX and older coming soon
data.value: Tier lists for XX and older coming soon

data.name: of {0} similar players in this folder
data.value: of {0} similar players in this folder

data.name: Import your scores to light this folder up
data.value: Import your scores to light this folder up

data.name: Score Ranking: What percent of players of comparable (+/- .5 competitive level) your score is on a chart.
data.value: Score Ranking: What percent of players of comparable (+/- .5 competitive level) your score is on a chart.

data.name: Skill data: PIU Center — maintained by aesthete
data.value: Skill data: PIU Center — maintained by aesthete

data.name: View full chart on PIU Center
data.value: View full chart on PIU Center

data.name: Why Don't You Get Up and Dance, Man?
data.value: Why Don't You Get Up and Dance, Man?

data.name: Step analysis data from PIU Center
data.value: Step analysis data from PIU Center

data.name: Select a key, pick the chart it belongs to, then bind
data.value: Select a key, pick the chart it belongs to, then bind

data.name: A snapshot zip imports a fetched data release directly - same pipeline as the crawl, no fetching
data.value: A snapshot zip imports a fetched data release directly - same pipeline as the crawl, no fetching

data.name: There was an error uploading the snapshot
data.value: There was an error uploading the snapshot

data.name: This page isn't ready for older mixes yet
data.value: This page isn't ready for older mixes yet

data.name: Active — {0} scores nearby, {1} skills have enough evidence
data.value: Active — {0} scores nearby, {1} skills have enough evidence

data.name: Every chart you've scored within 3 folders votes on your skills — closer folders and bigger skill coverage count more.
data.value: Every chart you've scored within 3 folders votes on your skills — closer folders and bigger skill coverage count more.

data.name: How each skill runs against your own average
data.value: How each skill runs against your own average

data.name: Players within one competitive level of you — closer players count more, and so do those whose folder ratings agree with yours.
data.value: Players within one competitive level of you — closer players count more, and so do those whose folder ratings agree with yours.

data.name: Same skills, two questions: this folder view asks how the charts you've played here actually go — the blend view asks which skills run hot or cold across everything you've scored nearby. A skill can look fine here and still move charts.
data.value: Same skills, two questions: this folder view asks how the charts you've played here actually go — the blend view asks which skills run hot or cold across everything you've scored nearby. A skill can look fine here and still move charts.

data.name: Silent — no players found in your competitive range yet.
data.value: Silent — no players found in your competitive range yet.

data.name: Silent — only {0} skills have enough evidence. Your list currently matches the community's. Score more charts near this folder to turn this on.
data.value: Silent — only {0} skills have enough evidence. Your list currently matches the community's. Score more charts near this folder to turn this on.

data.name: The shared tier list for this folder, built from everyone's data.
data.value: The shared tier list for this folder, built from everyone's data.

data.name: Three sources vote on every chart. Sources with more weight move charts further.
data.value: Three sources vote on every chart. Sources with more weight move charts further.

data.name: Two views of the same skills. The left one feeds the blend above; the right one is this folder as Folder Stats shows it.
data.value: Two views of the same skills. The left one feeds the blend above; the right one is this folder as Folder Stats shows it.

data.name: Vs. Peers: how your scores rank against players of similar competitive level, averaged over this folder's charts featuring the skill. Greyed skills don't have enough evidence to vote yet.
data.value: Vs. Peers: how your scores rank against players of similar competitive level, averaged over this folder's charts featuring the skill. Greyed skills don't have enough evidence to vote yet.

data.name: Where your list disagrees with the community's, and the skills that pushed it. Tap a chart for its full source breakdown.
data.value: Where your list disagrees with the community's, and the skills that pushed it. Tap a chart for its full source breakdown.

data.name: Your ability on the charts you've played here — the same numbers as Folder Stats
data.value: Your ability on the charts you've played here — the same numbers as Folder Stats

data.name: Your list currently matches the community's on every rated chart.
data.value: Your list currently matches the community's on every rated chart.

data.name: Your personalized list moves {0} of {1} charts away from the community's.
data.value: Your personalized list moves {0} of {1} charts away from the community's.

data.name: {0} don't have enough data to move
data.value: {0} don't have enough data to move

data.name: {0} don't have enough skill data to move:
data.value: {0} don't have enough skill data to move:

data.name: Evidence already includes score age — older scores count for less.
data.value: Evidence already includes score age — older scores count for less.

data.name: Older scores count for less — {0} of your nearby scores are much older than the rest of your record.
data.value: Older scores count for less — {0} of your nearby scores are much older than the rest of your record.

data.name: Build your home page from widgets you choose.
data.value: Build your home page from widgets you choose.

data.name: Add widgets to this page in edit mode.
data.value: Add widgets to this page in edit mode.

data.name: This widget is no longer available.
data.value: This widget is no longer available.

data.name: Something went wrong loading this widget.
data.value: Something went wrong loading this widget.

data.name: This page is pre-release — your layout and widget settings may be reset before launch.
data.value: This page is pre-release — your layout and widget settings may be reset before launch.

data.name: Competitive Level over time for your selected mixes.
data.value: Competitive Level over time for your selected mixes.

data.name: Your level history starts tracking with your next import.
data.value: Your level history starts tracking with your next import.

data.name: Pumbility targets tuned to your skill profile.
data.value: Pumbility targets tuned to your skill profile.

data.name: No scores yet — Pumbility starts with your first import.
data.value: No scores yet — Pumbility starts with your first import.

data.name: This week's board and your placements.
data.value: This week's board and your placements.

data.name: This import will replace this page's widgets.
data.value: This import will replace this page's widgets.

data.name: Score tracking for Pump It Up
data.value: Score tracking for Pump It Up

data.name: PIU Scores keeps your whole Pump It Up history, imported straight from your PIUGAME account, and turns it into tier lists, rankings, and recommendations tuned to how you actually play.
data.value: PIU Scores keeps your whole Pump It Up history, imported straight from your PIUGAME account, and turns it into tier lists, rankings, and recommendations tuned to how you actually play.

data.name: Free, and built by a player.
data.value: Free, and built by a player.

data.name: New here? Signing in creates your account automatically — no forms, no site password.
data.value: New here? Signing in creates your account automatically — no forms, no site password.

data.name: PIUGAME sign-in goes directly to piugame.com — your password is never stored or logged here.
data.value: PIUGAME sign-in goes directly to piugame.com — your password is never stored or logged here.

data.name: Already have an account? Any sign-in method you've linked works — and you can link more from your Account page.
data.value: Already have an account? Any sign-in method you've linked works — and you can link more from your Account page.

data.name: Everything below is live site data — the actual product, not screenshots.
data.value: Everything below is live site data — the actual product, not screenshots.

data.name: Difficulty bands computed from the community's real pass and score data — recalculated as scores come in, not argued into a wiki.
data.value: Difficulty bands computed from the community's real pass and score data — recalculated as scores come in, not argued into a wiki.

data.name: One shared board, one week — everyone posts their best on the same charts.
data.value: One shared board, one week — everyone posts their best on the same charts.

data.name: Point it at your PIUGAME account once — grades, plates, and history land intact.
data.value: Point it at your PIUGAME account once — grades, plates, and history land intact.

data.name: Session roundup captured on the way in — a new UG plate, 2 PBs, one folder lamp.
data.value: Session roundup captured on the way in — a new UG plate, 2 PBs, one folder lamp.

data.name: Pumbility rating, titles, and a season recap worth screenshotting.
data.value: Pumbility rating, titles, and a season recap worth screenshotting.

data.name: Browse every title — no account needed
data.value: Browse every title — no account needed

data.name: Make it your home base — and run your scene from it.
data.value: Make it your home base — and run your scene from it.

data.name: Pick your widgets — projections, the weekly board, your daily step — and arrange your own dashboard. Your home page, your call.
data.value: Pick your widgets — projections, the weekly board, your daily step — and arrange your own dashboard. Your home page, your call.

data.name: Roll charts with the randomizer, run brackets and card drafts at your local, and share a live view so the whole venue — or the stream — can follow the round.
data.value: Roll charts with the randomizer, run brackets and card drafts at your local, and share a live view so the whole venue — or the stream — can follow the round.

data.name: Post qualifier scores for community tournaments right from the site, and take on March of Murlocs — the site-run stamina session series. More formats on the way.
data.value: Post qualifier scores for community tournaments right from the site, and take on March of Murlocs — the site-run stamina session series. More formats on the way.

data.name: Point your community's channel at the bot and placements, milestones, and session highlights land in your server the moment scores come in.
data.value: Point your community's channel at the bot and placements, milestones, and session highlights land in your server the moment scores come in.

data.name: Session roundup — 3 highlights: new UG plate, 2 PBs. Weekly board: up to 2nd place.
data.value: Session roundup — 3 highlights: new UG plate, 2 PBs. Weekly board: up to 2nd place.

data.name: This is community infrastructure, not a data silo.
data.value: This is community infrastructure, not a data silo.

data.name: When a new mix arrives, nothing here resets. Every score you've recorded stays — to look back on, compare against, and build from. {0} mixes on record, side by side, 1999 to today.
data.value: When a new mix arrives, nothing here resets. Every score you've recorded stays — to look back on, compare against, and build from. {0} mixes on record, side by side, 1999 to today.

data.name: Your scores stay yours to show. They power the aggregate analysis behind the tier lists, but your name and history are never public unless you switch them on.
data.value: Your scores stay yours to show. They power the aggregate analysis behind the tier lists, but your name and history are never public unless you switch them on.

data.name: Download every score you've ever recorded, any time, in one click. No lock-in, no hoarding — if you ever want to leave, your history leaves with you.
data.value: Download every score you've ever recorded, any time, in one click. No lock-in, no hoarding — if you ever want to leave, your history leaves with you.

data.name: A public API with full docs powers community-made tools — bots, overlays, stat sites. Grab a token from your account and build on the same data we use.
data.value: A public API with full docs powers community-made tools — bots, overlays, stat sites. Grab a token from your account and build on the same data we use.

data.name: No account needed to look around
data.value: No account needed to look around

data.name: The tier lists, rankings, and calculators are open — sign in when you want your own scores in the picture.
data.value: The tier lists, rankings, and calculators are open — sign in when you want your own scores in the picture.

data.name: Which charts are honest for their level — and which lie.
data.value: Which charts are honest for their level — and which lie.

data.name: Mirrored official leaderboards, player compare, country boards.
data.value: Mirrored official leaderboards, player compare, country boards.

data.name: Phoenix score math, life gauge, rating what-ifs.
data.value: Phoenix score math, life gauge, rating what-ifs.

data.name: PIU Scores — free, ad-free, built by a player
data.value: PIU Scores — free, ad-free, built by a player

data.name: The level printed on the chart.
data.value: The level printed on the chart.

data.name: Closest PGs, top-50 picks, and old scores due a revisit.
data.value: Closest PGs, top-50 picks, and old scores due a revisit.

data.name: Charts toward your next title, plus skill titles one SSS away.
data.value: Charts toward your next title, plus skill titles one SSS away.

data.name: Charts picked for you, tuned by goal.
data.value: Charts picked for you, tuned by goal.

data.name: Nothing to suggest yet — play and import some scores first.
data.value: Nothing to suggest yet — play and import some scores first.

data.name: Follows your competitive level as it moves.
data.value: Follows your competitive level as it moves.

data.name: Community-calibrated difficulty — a chart that scores like a 21 counts as a 21.
data.value: Community-calibrated difficulty — a chart that scores like a 21 counts as a 21.

data.name: The Category Isn't Interesting to Me
data.value: The Category Isn't Interesting to Me

data.name: Approachable unpassed charts around your level.
data.value: Approachable unpassed charts around your level.

data.name: Recent big wins from the communities you pick.
data.value: Recent big wins from the communities you pick.

data.name: Rare PGs, big titles, and top scores from your communities show up here.
data.value: Rare PGs, big titles, and top scores from your communities show up here.

data.name: Join a community to use this widget.
data.value: Join a community to use this widget.

data.name: Leave all unchecked to follow your non-regional communities.
data.value: Leave all unchecked to follow your non-regional communities.

data.name: Today's shared chart, plus a weekly Limbo Day.
data.value: Today's shared chart, plus a weekly Limbo Day.

data.name: Limbo Day: lowest passing score wins!
data.value: Limbo Day: lowest passing score wins!

data.name: Record a score by hand for any chart.
data.value: Record a score by hand for any chart.

data.name: There was an error while recording the score
data.value: There was an error while recording the score

data.name: Your Pumbility and competitive level, plus your closest matches.
data.value: Your Pumbility and competitive level, plus your closest matches.

data.name: Your closest matches show at 1×2 and taller.
data.value: Your closest matches show at 1×2 and taller.

data.name: The biggest Pumbility gains available to you right now.
data.value: The biggest Pumbility gains available to you right now.

data.name: Show Singles & Doubles as separate data
data.value: Show Singles & Doubles as separate data

data.name: This mix isn't score-normalized — only Letter Grade & Pass are available.
data.value: This mix isn't score-normalized — only Letter Grade & Pass are available.

data.name: No scores in this range yet — record or import to see your breakdown.
data.value: No scores in this range yet — record or import to see your breakdown.

data.name: One configurable graph of your scores, grades, plates, or clears by level.
data.value: One configurable graph of your scores, grades, plates, or clears by level.

data.name: Score spread per level — min, quartiles, max, with the IQR shaded.
data.value: Score spread per level — min, quartiles, max, with the IQR shaded.

data.name: What grades fill each folder, normalized so shape beats volume.
data.value: What grades fill each folder, normalized so shape beats volume.

data.name: Chasing plates — % of each folder at MG, UG, and full Perfect Game.
data.value: Chasing plates — % of each folder at MG, UG, and full Perfect Game.

data.name: How much of every folder you've passed, Singles vs Doubles.
data.value: How much of every folder you've passed, Singles vs Doubles.

data.name: How each folder's plates stack up — Marvelous, Ultimate, and Perfect Game.
data.value: How each folder's plates stack up — Marvelous, Ultimate, and Perfect Game.

data.name: How much of every folder you've cleared, per level.
data.value: How much of every folder you've cleared, per level.

data.name: How each folder stacks up by score tier: ≥950k, ≥990k, and 1,000,000.
data.value: How each folder stacks up by score tier: ≥950k, ≥990k, and 1,000,000.

data.name: How much of every folder you've cleared, Singles vs Doubles.
data.value: How much of every folder you've cleared, Singles vs Doubles.

data.name: How stale your scores are per folder — the spread of days since you set them.
data.value: How stale your scores are per folder — the spread of days since you set them.

data.name: Your score spread per level, Singles against Doubles, the middle 50% shaded.
data.value: Your score spread per level, Singles against Doubles, the middle 50% shaded.

data.name: Every grade stacked per folder, with a broken / unplayed cap for the folder count.
data.value: Every grade stacked per folder, with a broken / unplayed cap for the folder count.

data.name: Every plate stacked per folder, with a broken / unplayed cap for the folder count.
data.value: Every plate stacked per folder, with a broken / unplayed cap for the folder count.

data.name: How many co-op charts you've cleared, by player count.
data.value: How many co-op charts you've cleared, by player count.

data.name: Remember my password on this device
data.value: Remember my password on this device

data.name: Couldn't unlock your saved password. Enter it to import.
data.value: Couldn't unlock your saved password. Enter it to import.

data.name: All saved credentials have been cleared.
data.value: All saved credentials have been cleared.

data.name: Deletes every saved import password on every device. Users re-enter on their next import. Use if you suspect a breach.
data.value: Deletes every saved import password on every device. Users re-enter on their next import. Use if you suspect a breach.

data.name: For the technically curious — how it actually works
data.value: For the technically curious — how it actually works

data.name: Reading it takes three things at once, held in three different places:
data.value: Reading it takes three things at once, held in three different places:

data.name: on this device only. Useless on its own.
data.value: on this device only. Useless on its own.

data.name: in our database, locked so it can't be opened alone.
data.value: in our database, locked so it can't be opened alone.

data.name: locked in a vault inside Microsoft Azure.
data.value: locked in a vault inside Microsoft Azure.

data.name: Turning this on is like writing your password on a sticky note you keep in your own pocket — except the note is in a code nobody can read by looking at it, not even us.
data.value: Turning this on is like writing your password on a sticky note you keep in your own pocket — except the note is in a code nobody can read by looking at it, not even us.

data.name: All three come together only for the split second you press Import — we decode it, log in for you, and immediately forget it. Your real password is never written down anywhere.
data.value: All three come together only for the split second you press Import — we decode it, log in for you, and immediately forget it. Your real password is never written down anywhere.

data.name: Because a coded copy of your password lives on this device, please make sure your Pump It Up password is one you use only here — not the one that also opens your email or your bank.
data.value: Because a coded copy of your password lives on this device, please make sure your Pump It Up password is one you use only here — not the one that also opens your email or your bank.

data.name: Enter your piugame login once. It's encrypted on this device the moment you press Store — we never keep a readable copy.
data.value: Enter your piugame login once. It's encrypted on this device the moment you press Store — we never keep a readable copy.

data.name: Your username and password are sealed together with AES-256-GCM under a random data key. That data key is wrapped by a master key that never leaves Azure Key Vault.
data.value: Your username and password are sealed together with AES-256-GCM under a random data key. That data key is wrapped by a master key that never leaves Azure Key Vault.

data.name: The ciphertext lives in your browser; the wrapped key lives in our database; the master key lives in Key Vault. Decryption needs all three — a dump of any one, or any two, yields nothing. No password is ever written to our database or logs.
data.value: The ciphertext lives in your browser; the wrapped key lives in our database; the master key lives in Key Vault. Decryption needs all three — a dump of any one, or any two, yields nothing. No password is ever written to our database or logs.

data.name: This is not zero-knowledge: because the login runs on our server, we can technically decrypt your credential at the moment you import. We don't log or keep it — but you are trusting us with the same access we already have on every manual import.
data.value: This is not zero-knowledge: because the login runs on our server, we can technically decrypt your credential at the moment you import. We don't log or keep it — but you are trusting us with the same access we already have on every manual import.

data.name: Also send imported scores to PIU Tracker, a community score site.
data.value: Also send imported scores to PIU Tracker, a community score site.

data.name: PIU Tracker is fully public — scores you send there are public even if your profile isn't.
data.value: PIU Tracker is fully public — scores you send there are public even if your profile isn't.

data.name: Most clears stall below {0} — the steepest step on this board.
data.value: Most clears stall below {0} — the steepest step on this board.

data.name: Scores open up around competitive level {0}.
data.value: Scores open up around competitive level {0}.

data.name: Sustained — it holds you under tension for most of its runtime.
data.value: Sustained — it holds you under tension for most of its runtime.

data.name: First passes cluster between competitive levels {0} and {1}.
data.value: First passes cluster between competitive levels {0} and {1}.

data.name: Plays a level easier than its label
data.value: Plays a level easier than its label

data.name: Very easy to pass for its level
data.value: Very easy to pass for its level

data.name: Easy to pass for its level
data.value: Easy to pass for its level

data.name: Hard to pass for its level
data.value: Hard to pass for its level

data.name: Very hard to pass for its level
data.value: Very hard to pass for its level

data.name: Plays a level harder than its label
data.value: Plays a level harder than its label

data.name: generous to score once you're through
data.value: generous to score once you're through

data.name: stingy to score even when passed
data.value: stingy to score even when passed

data.name: Not enough data yet to name similar charts — the graph rebuilds nightly.
data.value: Not enough data yet to name similar charts — the graph rebuilds nightly.

data.name: No score yet — record your first attempt and this lights up.
data.value: No score yet — record your first attempt and this lights up.

data.name: How this board's letter grades distribute.
data.value: How this board's letter grades distribute.

data.name: Plates earned by this board's clears.
data.value: Plates earned by this board's clears.

data.name: Minimum, average, and maximum score at each competitive level.
data.value: Minimum, average, and maximum score at each competitive level.

data.name: Where this chart's passes sit, by competitive level.
data.value: Where this chart's passes sit, by competitive level.

data.name: No scores recorded yet — import yours to light this up.
data.value: No scores recorded yet — import yours to light this up.

data.name: No scores recorded yet — be the first.
data.value: No scores recorded yet — be the first.

data.name: Search by song name — every chart has its own page.
data.value: Search by song name — every chart has its own page.

data.name: Level changes across mixes, from the catalog record.
data.value: Level changes across mixes, from the catalog record.

data.name: From the similarity graph — evidence-weighted, rebuilt nightly.
data.value: From the similarity graph — evidence-weighted, rebuilt nightly.

data.name: Compared {0} charts ({1}) — none cleared the bar.
data.value: Compared {0} charts ({1}) — none cleared the bar.

data.name: No significant matches — here's the closest we could find.
data.value: No significant matches — here's the closest we could find.

data.name: Sign in to order by your own tier lists
data.value: Sign in to order by your own tier lists

data.name: Strongest match first — no difficulty applied
data.value: Strongest match first — no difficulty applied

data.name: Easiest to clear first, from your Pass tier list
data.value: Easiest to clear first, from your Pass tier list

data.name: Easiest to clear first, from the community Pass tier list
data.value: Easiest to clear first, from the community Pass tier list

data.name: Easiest to score first, from your Score tier list
data.value: Easiest to score first, from your Score tier list

data.name: Easiest to score first, by scoring level
data.value: Easiest to score first, by scoring level

data.name: Share of the chart each pattern and demand covers
data.value: Share of the chart each pattern and demand covers

data.name: Switch on a filter to narrow what this chart is compared against.
data.value: Switch on a filter to narrow what this chart is compared against.

data.name: This chart has no {0} on record
data.value: This chart has no {0} on record
